feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Some headings in Fiori is only showing when the mouse cursor is there
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Some headings in Fiori is only showing when the mouse cursor is there. The heading is getting disappeared when I moved the mouse cursor from the heading.

Thanks & Regards
Dipanjan Das

entry.title: BPマスタのFI得意先タブにある「振込人名」の表示順について
entry.content:
お世話になっております。
BPマスタのFI得意先タブにある「振込人名」の表示順について、SAP標準仕様を確認させてください。
現在、振込人名の入力項目は、以下のように「先頭数字」と「振込人名」の2つの要素で構成されている認識です。
例：
1　振込人名111
2　振込人名222
3　振込人名333
当初、複数の振込人名を登録した場合、表示順は先頭数字の昇順になると想定しておりました。
想定していた表示順：
1　振込人名111
2　振込人名222
3　振込人名333
しかし、実機で確認したところ、表示順は先頭数字の順番ではなく、入力・保存した順番で表示されているように見受けられます。
例えば、以下の順番で振込人名を入力・保存した場合、表示結果は下記の通りとなりました。
【確認例】
「3　333」を入力して保存表示結果：
3　333
続けて「2　222」を入力して保存表示結果：
3　333
2　222
続けて「1　111」を入力して保存表示結果：
3　333
2　222
1　111
続けて「4　444」を入力して保存表示結果：
3　333
2　222
1　111
4　444
上記の結果より、振込人名の表示順は、先頭数字の昇順ではなく、入力順または登録順に従って表示されているように見えます。
つきましては、以下についてご確認をお願いいたします。
1. BPマスタのFI得意先タブにおける振込人名の表示順は、「先頭数字」はソートキーではなく、SAP標準仕様として「入力順／登録順」で表示される認識で正しいでしょうか。

お手数をおかけしますが、ご確認のほどよろしくお願いいたします。

entry.title: I get error message 06217 saying Net price (INR) is too large
entry.content: I get error message 06217 saying "Net price (INR) is too large" while creating a cross-location transfer order. After I fill in the valuation type, the error is gone. What causes this issue?

entry.title: Header Note in My Purchase Requisitions (F1643A)
entry.content:
Good day, 

Inside F1643A or the My Purchase Requisitions app of S4Hana Public Cloud, there is a field for Header Notes. Would be possible to map this field to purchase order or directly to PO output form?

I tried the copying texts configuration but the inputs in header note of PR aren't copied to purchase order. Is there a way to copy the header notes of PR? or is this a limitation of the system?

entry.title: Valuation type differs from valuation type of batch
entry.content: While doing GR, the system is issuing the error "Valuation type differs from valuation type of batch". The batch and valuation type are maintained correctly at the batch level; however, the valuation type in the PO differs from the valuation type assigned to the batch. Kindly review the issue and provide a solution to proceed with the GR posting.

entry.title: Hi Team, Activate Mass changes all items of a document,FAGLL03H, FBL3H, FBL1H, FBL5H, Mass Change
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Activate Mass  changes all items of a document,transaction code -FAGLL03H, FBL3H, FBL1H, FBL5H.

 

Thanks and Regards

Pramoda shetty

entry.title: Remaining value in the asset even after completion of useful life
entry.content:
We have certain assets in our system, wherein their useful life has been completed, but there is still some value that remains in the asset, we use the ‘day wise depreciation’ method.

Now the depreciation on the said asset was last run in FY 2023, now the system is not allowing us to calculate the unplanned depreciation, since the FY 2023 is already closed & we cannot keep more than 2 fiscal years open in the system.

entry.title: Difference Between AA Reports and GL Reports – AUC BS accounts
entry.content:
We identified a discrepancy between values shown in Asset Accounting (AA) reports and General Ledger (GL) account reports for Assets Under Construction (AuC). After investigation, the difference appears to be related to down payments that are posted to a technical account according to the current configuration. 

Issue Description 

  • In AA reports, the full amount is displayed under the balance sheet GL account assigned to the AuC. 

  •

entry.title: Error message KI235 in MIGO in a canceliation document
entry.content:
We want to cancel a MM document 2002463935 in PS4 system in MIGO.

We generate an error message KI235 saying that we need to feed a CO object in the posting.

But we have the original PP Ordre in the original document, which appears in the imputation screen.

Why the system is asking for an object already in the document ?

entry.title: Change WBS Element Status FIORI App is not showing WBS elements
entry.content: FIORI App " Change WBS Element Status FIORI App is not showing WBS elements" to change system status .

entry.title: fbl1 t.code more then 1000 layout is missing in the production system
entry.content: in t.code fbl1  most of the business use the t.code they has created more layout as per there requirement but we are not able to find the layout that is created by the business user

entry.title: Issue with PO Item level conditions during Third-party PO creation
entry.content:
When creating a Third-party Purchase Order in ME21N from a Third -party purchase requisition, conditions irrelevant to the PO type for Third party Purchase order are populated in the PO Item level conditions tab. 

When trying to create a Third-party Purchase Order via ME21N, if we select the PO Type for Normal Purchase order, adopt the Third-party Purchase Requisition, then we change the PO type for Third-party purchase order, the conditions that were populated for Normal PO Type are still listed in the PO Item level conditions tab.

entry.title: OMJI changes are not capturing into a TR.
entry.content:
Hi,

Due to LIS issue, we changed the setup in OMJI from LIS to exclusive block.

While saving, the changes are not capturing into TR.

Kindly suggest us with solution how can we move those changes to PRODUCTION.

regards,

Lakshmi

entry.title: How to estimate SUM directory disk size requirements for SAP Release Upgrades or S4 Conversion
entry.content:
Dear Guru's,

We have a requirement to perform a S4 Conversion upgrade from EHP8 to S4Hana 2023.

We need to know the disk space needed for SUM folder for the Upgrade.

SAP System Source Details:
On-Prem
Database: HANA
OS:SLES
Database size:500 GB

Target:
S4Hana 2023.

No DMO needed only S4 Conversion.

Do we have any thumb rule for calculating the SUM folder disk space requirements ?

I could see from documents that space of 50 GB is needed but could not see any specific thumb rule or any calculations for SUM folder. 

How we can calculate SUM folder space requirement before hand? I also checked Sizing guide could not find any

Kindly do the needful

Thanks in advance

Regards,
Mithran

entry.title: Logging table SAPWSD./1CADMC/00000262 in source system is very large
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

Logging table SAPWSD./1CADMC/00000262 in source system  is very large, attached is the screenshot for your reference. 

So we were checking as this is not an application table and is a SLT related Logging table So what's the best practice to reduce its growth ? is it table paritioning ? or is it reloading the table again ?

We have gone through some notes and found out that SAP suggests Hash partioning as per note 2014562

Please confirm how we proceed to fix this ?

entry.title: Unable to connect VS Code and MCP Server to S/4HANA 1709: Error "/sap/bc/adt does not exist"
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

We are attempting to establish a connection between VS Code/MCP Server and our SAP backend. However, the MCP server fails to start and returns the following error message: Error: /sap/bc/adt does not exist

We have verified via transaction code SICF that the ICF node /sap/bc/adt is already active.The SAP connection configuration in VS Code has been correctly set up.The MCP server configuration is complete, but it consistently fails at the handshake stage with the aforementioned error.        

Questions for Clarification:

  1. Is this error caused by a version limitation? Specifically, does S/4HANA 1709 lack the full backend support required for the ADT protocol used by VS Code extensions?
  2. Are there any specific prerequisite components, Business Functions, or additional patches that must be installed/enabled to make /sap/bc/adt fully functional for external IDE connections on this release?

entry.title: Tax code is not reflecting in work order
entry.content: Tax code is not reflecting in work order

entry.title: Information message Customer 1055924: contact person 0000000000 is not created Message No. VP203
entry.content:
Hello Team,

My user is getting Information message while creating sales order w.r.t. Quotation.

QS4 Quotation 0024433424 if you try to create sales order information message popup Occur Customer 1055924: contact person 0000000000 is not created Message No. VP203.

i have check the Contact person in Relationship is maintian correctly, having validity.

the same process i have done with my id but i am not getting the same information message.

what is Root cause of this message can you please explain.

regards

sanjay jadhav

entry.title: SWAPS ST02
entry.content:
Hello team,

Can anyone please let me know as how to analyse the swaps and what parameters i have to increase.?

Please find below a screen shot for swaps in Tune Summary and give the suggestion...

thanks in advance

entry.title: Error in PUP price for Material:PPRSSFB-5KG-RS400
entry.content:
Hi,

We are facing Per unit price calculation error for hte material: PPRSSFB-5KG-RS400 in Plant: HACP.

We have observed that the Per Unit Price: as Rs.38,316.73 for the Period: 03/2026, where as standard price is Rs:29.0

We have verified all the records and unable to find how this price is got upated in the material master.

Please check and advise on this
